name: Veeva Commercial Cloud CRM API
what_it_does: Veeva Vault and CRM REST APIs for life sciences commercial operations platform. Enables AI agents to manage healthcare professional (HCP) and healthcare organization (HCO) master data retrieval for commercial operations, handle pharmaceutical sales call and sampling event data management, access medical affairs engagement and KOL relationship data, retrieve promotional material approval workflow status from MLR (Medical, Legal, Regulatory) review, manage clinical trial site and investigator data for medical affairs, handle approved email and digital channel engagement tracking, access HCP targeting and segmentation data for sales optimization, retrieve prescription data (Rx) analytics for brand performance tracking, manage compliance documentation for FDA and state pharmaceutical regulations, and integrate commercial data with ERP, marketing automation, and healthcare analytics platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving HCP engagement data from pharmaceutical sales agents
Tracking MLR content approval status from medical affairs agents
Analyzing Rx prescription performance from commercial analytics agents
Managing KOL engagement from medical affairs automation agents
not_for: Healthcare provider EMR and clinical systems without pharma commercial focus
General CRM without life sciences regulatory and compliance requirements
Non-pharmaceutical industries without HCP relationship and compliance needs
best_when: A pharmaceutical or biotech company using Veeva CRM and Vault wants AI agents to automate HCP engagement tracking, content approval workflow monitoring, Rx analytics, and commercial operations reporting.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Pharmaceutical promotional materials require FDA-compliant MLR review before distribution — automated content distribution without MLR approval violates FDA promotional regulations and creates significant regulatory liability. HCP sampling data must comply with Sunshine Act reporting requirements; automated sampling without compliance tracking creates federal reporting violations. HCP data contains regulated healthcare information requiring HIPAA compliance for certain use cases.

auth.notes: Veeva uses OAuth 2.0 and session-based authentication. Separate auth for Vault and CRM APIs. Developer portal at developer.veeva.com. SDKs available for Vault API. Webhooks for Vault document lifecycle events. REST API with JSON. Pleasanton, California HQ. Veeva is Salesforce-native for CRM; Vault is proprietary content management platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; CRM seat-based and Vault product-based pricing
pricing.notes: Pleasanton, California. Founded 2007. Public (VEEV NYSE). $2.4B+ annual revenue. Life sciences CRM market leader. 1,000+ pharmaceutical and biotech customers. Veeva CRM built on Salesforce platform (transitioning to proprietary Vault CRM 2025). Vault platform for regulated content management. Competes with IQVIA OCE for pharma CRM.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per application; documented in developer portal; Vault and CRM APIs have separate limits

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: Promotional material distribution requires completed MLR review; automated content distribution bypassing approval workflow is an FDA regulatory violation
Sunshine Act sampling compliance — automated HCP sampling events must capture compliant Sunshine Act data (physician, product, amount); incomplete data causes federal reporting violations
Vault vs. CRM separate APIs — Veeva Vault (content management) and Veeva CRM have separate APIs, authentication, and endpoints; understand which system holds the data you need
Salesforce to Vault CRM migration — Veeva is migrating from Salesforce-based CRM to proprietary Vault CRM (2025); API patterns will change; verify current CRM platform before building
HCP data privacy — HCP master data in Veeva has jurisdiction-specific privacy implications (GDPR for EU HCPs); automated HCP data processing requires compliant data agreements
MLR status polling — document approval status in Vault requires polling or webhooks; don't assume synchronous approval status after content submission
agent_readiness.security_notes: Life sciences CRM and content management. SOC2, GxP, 21CFR11, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. HCP relationship, promotional content, and sampling data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pharma CRM and regulated content. SOC2, GxP, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. HCP data and regulatory content.
